label: Transparent starfish motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an orange starfish, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A five-armed tide-pool starfish with sea star orange body color, coral-orange arm gradients, tiny raised tube-foot texture, sand cream highlights, teal reflected shadows, and accurate radial anatomy.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop any arm tips.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves tactile starfish bumps, radial form, and warm coastal color.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no beach scene, no water background, no decorative background, no second subject.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Starfish" derived from the visible transparent orange starfish cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the sea star orange body, sand cream highlights, teal tide-pool shadows, raised surface dots, shell-gold accents, and radial five-arm geometry in the visible cutout. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme, so token roles and component examples must be clear and readable.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Starfish, Starfish, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics. Show multilingual product UI guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, sand-cream surfaces, starfish-dot micro-textures, radial separators, playful operations-system mood.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: sand cream, sea star orange, tide teal, shell gold, arm coral, foam shell, wet sand, pool shadow, tidepool ink.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Starfish".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Starfish design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent starfish cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Starfish board as references. Preserve the orange, sand, teal, and shell-gold palette roles, radial component language, dot texture, playful operations spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme, so dark-mode token roles and component states must be clear.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Starfish, Starfish, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from tidepool ink and pool shadow, light text from sand cream, primary accents from sea star orange, secondary accents from tide teal, shell gold chart details, restrained contrast, subtle starfish-dot and tide-ring overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Starfish".
